MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: KEVIN SULLIVAN, ESQ., 415.397.2600, FOR PLAINTIFF DEBORAH WHITING.
DAVID LANE, ESQ., 415.516.9373, FOR DEFENDANTS STEWARD DUGAN, NICOLE DUGAN AND EILEEN O'DAY.

RULING: MATTER ARGUED. AT CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT TAKES DEFENDANTs STEWART DUGAN, NICOLE DUGAN & EILEEN O'DAY's motion For An Order To Compel Further Responses To Request For Document Production, Answers To Interrogatories And For Sanctions UNDER SUBMISSION. PARTIES HAVE RESOLVED THIS MOTION AS TO ISSUES OF DOCUMENT PRODUCTION AND INTERROGATORIES; THE MOTION IS BEING TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION FOR DECISION AS TO THE REMAINING ISSUE: SANCTIONS. COUNSEL FOR BOTH PARTIES TO SUBMIT JOINT OR SEPARATE PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM NILS ROSENQUEST, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
